whats_special_tags: Landscaped gardens, Garden views, Abundant closet space throughout, Beautifully renovated corner apartment, Gracious foyer, Pristine engineered hardwood floors
whats_special_description:
No appointment necessary for open house!

This beautifully renovated corner apartment offers a rare blend of warmth, comfort, and thoughtful design, visible the moment you step inside, where a gracious foyer draws you in to the generous main living area flooded with light. Pristine engineered hardwood floors run seamlessly across the space, creating a sense of warmth, calm and cohesion. The galley kitchen offers two entrances, ideal for entertaining and everyday ease, while garden views bring a soft and serene backdrop to your daily routine.

Both bedrooms are comfortably sized, with the primary enjoying two serene exposures overlooking the landscaped gardens and pergola. Two full bathrooms, one with a shower and one with a tub, offer everyday convenience. Abundant closet space throughout ensures everything has a place. This is a large, comfortable home that offers a versatile floor plan where a small third bedroom, nursery or home office can easily be created. Check alternate floor plan for inspiration.

The ground-floor location adds a level of convenience many buyers appreciate. One especially unique feature is the shared, semi-private hallway and entrance used by only one other home, offering a welcome sense of privacy within a revered building known for its stability, care, and community.

University Towers is a gated, well-established cooperative known for its financial strength, thoughtful management, and ongoing capital improvements. Spread across more than five acres of beautifully maintained, landscaped grounds, this community offers a peaceful retreat with the convenience of Downtown Brooklyn right at your doorstep.

Parking available for sale or rent when available - please ask for details. There is NO flip tax and this co-op offers flexible purchase options, ie. co-purchasing, gifting, and parents buying for children - are all permitted. Sorry, no pets except as required by law.

Residents enjoy a robust suite of amenities, including 24-hour security, a renovated fitness center, dual elevators in each building, landscaped gardens, a professionally designed barbecue terrace with lounge seating and free Wi-Fi, a children’s playground, bike storage, general storage, a community room, and updated 24 hour laundry facilities with smart technology. Seasonal landscaping and full-time staff help keep the property feeling welcoming and well cared-for.

The location is exceptional: Trader Joe’s, Target, City Point, Dekalb Market Hall, Lidl, the Alamo Drafthouse, and countless dining and retail options are moments away. Fort Greene Park, the farmers market, and neighborhood boutiques add to the area’s charm. Transportation access is unmatched, with the B, Q, R trains just one block away, and quick access to the 2, 3, 4, 5, A, C, F, and G lines, multiple bus routes, and the LIRR at Atlantic Terminal, making travel throughout the city effortless.

Note: A small assessment began in September 2025 and will remain in place for two years. Please ask for details.

Welcome to 743 E 9th St, a charming single-family residence that seamlessly blends modern convenience with timeless elegance. This completely renovated home offers four bedrooms and two and a half bathrooms, designed to meet the needs of today's discerning homeowner.

Upon entering, you are greeted by a foyer that leads you to the open-concept living room and dining area, perfect for entertaining or relaxing with family. The parlor floor features a stylish powder room, adding to the home's functionality. The kitchen is a culinary enthusiast's dream, equipped with brand new Samsung Bespoke appliances, including a refrigerator, stove, and dishwasher. 

The kitchen's design is both practical and beautiful, featuring a farm-style sink, 42-inch upper cabinets, waterfall edge quartz countertops, and a custom glass backsplash. Under-counter lighting enhances the space, making it both inviting and efficient.

The upper level is adorned with new hardwood floors throughout the hallway and all bedrooms, offering a warm and inviting atmosphere. The main bedroom is equipped with California-style closet, providing ample storage space. The bathroom has been totally refinished, ensuring a spa-like experience.
The finished basement is a versatile suite, complete with new ceramic tile flooring, ideal for guests or additional living space. 

An electric fireplace with a quartz mantle adds a touch of luxury, while upgraded 220v electric and dimmable high hats throughout the house ensure modern functionality.

Additional features include new windows, wood-look ceramic tile throughout the first floor, new stair treads with ceramic tile risers, and a new LG washer and dryer. The exterior is equally impressive, with a new fence in the front yard and a newly paved sidewalk, enhancing curb appeal.

The backyard is perfect for warm-weather gatherings and dining al fresco, offering an inviting space to relax and entertain.

This home is move-in ready, offering comfort and style with nothing left to do. Experience the perfect blend of luxury and practicality at 743 E 9th St, where every detail has been thoughtfully considered for your enjoyment. 
Schedule an appointment to see for yourself. This can be your dream home.

whats_special_description: Classic Park Slope 1 BR nr Prospect Park Have you ever dreamed of owning your own fully renovated one bedroom home in a full service building in the heart of Park Slope? This sixth floor apartment sports new wide plank light floors, a large living room and sizable dining alcove. The bedroom is large enough for a king-sized bed or to include a home office. The bright new pass through kitchen has polished granite countertops, tile backsplashes, white cabinetry, and stainless steel appliances, including a Microwave and dishwasher. The new bathroom is paneled with subway tiles. Plentiful ambient light keeps this home bright throughout the day, and there are skyline views of downtown Brooklyn and Manhattan from all this home's rooms so even though you're living in a quiet neighborhood you feel connected to the cityscape of New York. 130 8th Avenue is a full service co-op situated in the most beautiful and historic part of Park Slope. It has a doorman, live-in super, 24 hour laundry, bike room, additional storage, and even a garage in the building. Subletting and pieds-a- terre are allowed. Co-purchasing gifting and guarantors are allowed on a case-by-case basis. Pets are welcome, with board approval. And the building is smoke-free! There is an assessment of $287.76 in place for Apt. 6E until December 2026. One of the BEST parts of living here is that you're just one block from Prospect Park, one of New York's most beautiful green spaces. You're just a block away from all of Park Slope's great shops and restaurants on 7th Avenue. The famous food co-op is close by, as is the farmers market in Grand Army Plaza. Public transit options are great: there are three different subway lines all a short distance away. You're also near the Brooklyn Museum, the main branch of the Brooklyn Public Library and the Brooklyn Botanic Garden.

whats_special_tags: Enormous northwest-facing windows, Private terrace space, Abundant natural light, Stunning three-bedroom two-bathroom condominium, Hudson valley lighting sconces, Bosch washer and dryer, Spa-like bathrooms
whats_special_description:
Welcome to Penthouse B at The Slope on Fifth, a stunning three-bedroom, two-bathroom condominium with private terrace space that offers an unparalleled living experience in the iconic Park Slope, Brooklyn. Enter this exquisite residence that blends modern elegance with contemporary Scandinavian influences. Exquisite PID engineered hardwood flooring in a European white oak finish sets the tone, while dramatic 11-foot ceilings and enormous northwest-facing windows flood the space with abundant natural light and showcase unparalleled views of the Manhattan and Brooklyn skylines. The expansive 28-by-14-foot living area and open kitchen layout create an ideal space for comfortable living. A 249-square-foot western-facing private terrace provides an exceptional outdoor retreat, perfect for relaxing or entertaining while enjoying breathtaking sunsets.
The kitchens are a chef's dream, equipped with Lineadecor premium woodgrain veneer custom cabinetry and stunning woodgrain white stone countertops and backsplash. Stylish Edwin LED linear suspension lighting in urban bronze illuminates the space, while top-of-the-line BOSCH appliances with custom seamless panels—including a built-in custom panel refrigerator, convection oven, freestanding multi burner gas range, smart built-in dishwasher, built-in microwave drawer, and integrated slide-out style range hood—ensure both functionality and sophistication. Rohl and Kohler faucets and fixtures add a touch of refinement, making cooking and entertaining a true pleasure.
Spa-like bathrooms at The Slope on Fifth continue the theme of luxury and comfort, featuring woodgrain white stone countertops complemented by Lineadecor custom vanities and recessed medicine cabinets. Residents can indulge in relaxation with Carvart soaking tubs and glass showers, all adorned with silver vein cut travertine wall tiles and flooring. Elegant Rohl Lombardia Tuscan Brass and Kohler oil rubbed bronze faucets and fixtures, along with Hudson Valley lighting sconces, create a serene and stylish ambiance. Additionally, there is a BOSCH washer and dryer to ensure convenience and ease.
An array of amenities:
24 hour doorman and intercom system
Spacious residents’ lounge and game room
State-of-the-art gym
Business center
Fully furnished roof deck with outdoor grill 
Pet Spa
Bike storage
Package room
Private rooftop cabanas for purchase
Storage units available for purchase
Parking spaces available for purchase 
Park Slope, Brooklyn, is a highly sought-after neighborhood known for its picturesque tree-lined streets and historic brownstones, creating a charming urban atmosphere. The area has excellent public schools, numerous parks, and a close-knit community that fosters connections among residents. Food enthusiasts will also appreciate the diverse culinary scene, with spots like Negril BK, Stone Park Cafe, and Al Di La Trattoria. Whether you're in the mood for farm-to-table dining or artisanal coffee, there are a wide range of restaurants, cafes, and bakeries, from trendy eateries to beloved local markets to explore. Proximity to Prospect Park enhances the appeal, offering easy access to outdoor activities, including jogging, cycling, picnicking, and even kayaking in the park’s lakes. The park also hosts concerts, festivals, and a zoo, making it a hub of community activity.
In addition to its aesthetic and community benefits, Park Slope boasts convenient transportation options, making commuting to Manhattan and other areas easy. The Slope on Fifth is served by the F and G trains at 4th Avenue and the N, Q, and R trains at 9th Street, providing quick access to various destinations. The vibrant cultural scene, featuring art galleries and theaters, adds to its dynamic character. **Some photographs may not be of the actual unit.

whats_special_tags: Abundance of natural light, Beautiful southern exposure throughout, Top-of-the-line bertazzoni appliances, King-sized primary bedroom, Oversized arched windows, Walk-in pantry, Exceptional amount of storage
whats_special_description:
Rarely available and truly one of a kind… welcome home to Residence 301 at Stratford Terrace. 

Thoughtfully arranged over two levels,  this exceptional duplex offers the best of both worlds. The space and comfort of a home you can grow into, paired with the high-end design and craftsmanship of a boutique condominium.

From the moment you step inside, you’re greeted by an abundance of natural light, framed by the iconic oversized arched windows that Stratford Terrace is known for. Spanning 1,201 square feet, the layout is designed for real life. The open-concept living and dining area is the kind of space that actually invites you to host—whether it’s a big dinner party or a quiet evening with the balcony doors open to catch the breeze.

The palatial chef’s kitchen is a dream come true—featuring top-of-the-line Bertazzoni appliances, sleek Caesarstone countertops and custom cabinetry. The oversized island is large enough to cook, prep, and entertain, with room for four high-top dining chairs. The kitchen alone offers an exceptional amount of storage, and is complemented by a walk-in pantry that gives this residence the feel of a true home rather than an apartment.

The king-sized primary bedroom includes an en suite tiled bathroom with a soaking tub, two closets, and access to the upper balcony. The second bedroom also generous in size, offers a secondary balcony entrance, with arched window doors bringing in beautiful southern exposure throughout.

Set on the third floor, this duplex is a true sanctuary—bright, quiet, and private—yet moments from the best of historic Ditmas Park. Enjoy local favorites (Blue Parlor, The Costello Plan and Mimi’s just to name a few) along Cortelyou Road, the Flatbush Food Co-op, Sunday Farmer’s Market, Prospect Park, and easy access to Manhattan via the B/Q trains.

Residence 301 means absolutely no compromises and why should you have to? Stop looking and start living.

*Unit also comes with a deeded 3’ X 10’ storage unit.

whats_special_description:
Tired of cookie-cutter new developments that all look alike? Welcome home to 246 Cumberland Street, a stunning 3-bedroom, 1-bathroom brownstone condo duplex located on a picturesque tree-lined street in the heart of Brooklyn. This beautifully renovated townhouse-style condo offers 1,600 square feet of carefully designed living space, blending timeless charm with modern comforts.

The warm and inviting living room features a decorative fireplace, built-in bookshelves and hardwood floors that flow throughout the home. With both northern and southern exposures, the space is bathed in natural light throughout the day. The kitchen has been thoughtfully updated and is equipped with a dishwasher, refrigerator, and ample counter space, making meal prep and entertaining a breeze.

Adjacent to the kitchen, the spacious dining room provides the perfect setting for gatherings with friends and family. Off the dining room is the home's private terrace, offering a serene outdoor retreat ideal for relaxing or enjoying your morning coffee.
A washer and dryer are conveniently located in the unit. Additional amenities include forced air heating and a secure voice intercom system for peace of mind.

Situated in a charming two-unit brownstone condo building with classic architectural details, this home offers a coveted Brooklyn lifestyle on one of the prettiest blocks in Fort Greene just steps from Fort Greene Park. Don’t miss the opportunity to make this duplex townhouse apartment your own—a space where elegance meets functionality.

whats_special_description:
Open Houses are by appointment only

Welcome to Penthouse 2 - a luxury dual-level residence with elevator access to both floors, exclusive foyer, and three generous private outdoor spaces (totaling 730+/- SF) with breathtaking views of the harbor and Manhattan skyline . This stunning duplex offers double-height ceilings and a sculptural staircase that serves as a striking architectural showpiece. With a versatile layout, PH2 is built for both entertaining and daily convenience.

Discover bespoke living at Two Sixteen 20th St—a boutique collection of six individually designed condominium residences. These refined homes blend modern luxury with timeless finishes. Expansive layouts feature 7.5" white oak flooring, LG split HVAC systems, and floor-to-ceiling Brooklyn warehouse-style windows. Double-paned Low-E glass ensures peace and energy efficiency.

Kitchens are designed to entertain, with Bertazzoni and Bosch appliances, externally vented hoods, wine fridges, quartz countertops, marble backsplashes, and custom soft-close cabinetry. Marble bathrooms are appointed with Kohler and Grohe fixtures, and vanities offer built-in storage. Every home is equipped with a Bosch washer and dryer for everyday ease.

Ideally located between South Slope and Greenwood, Two Sixteen 20th offers a rare blend of neighborhood charm and urban convenience. Enjoy the vibrant dining of 5th Avenue, Nitehawk Cinema, and the green expanses of Prospect Park and Greenwood Cemetery—all within reach. Commute effortlessly via nearby R, F, and G trains, Citibike stations, and multiple parking garages.

The complete offering terms are in an offering plan available from Sponsor. File No. CD24-0105. Sponsor: 216 20th St LLC., 1112 Wilmot Rd, Suite 218H, Scarsdale, NY 10583. Equal Housing Opportunity.

Disclaimer: Some images feature virtual renderings. For detailed information and to schedule a tour, please contact our Exclusive Agents.
